catalog.title: 1977 Seiko Catalog Vol.1
catalog.note: JDM annual. Men's mechanical lines (King Seiko, Lord-Matic, Actus, divers, chrono) + Quartz Emblem/Chario expose calibers; ladies/fancy pages had refs too small at 210 DPI (dropped). Empty-ref records dropped.
catalog.method: vision extraction in-harness (no paid API): pages rendered, read by Claude subagents writing batch JSON
